channel.title: SPL - NewHolly Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - NewHolly Branch

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: NewHolly Branch, Meeting Room

Trained tax preparers will set up laptops and help taxpayers do their own taxes.

Event details

item.title: Brick Buddies
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: NewHolly Branch, Meeting Room

Young children and their families are invited to join our drop-in play group with Lego bricks, Picasso tiles, and other building sets.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: NewHolly Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Game On for Kids! Role-playing game (RPG)
item.description:
Friday, March 20, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: NewHolly Branch, Meeting Room

Join us to play Imagination Quest, a role-playing adventure game.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: NewHolly Branch, Meeting Room

Trained tax preparers will set up laptops and help taxpayers do their own taxes.

Event details
